title: Find Players With Zero or One Losses
titleCn: 找出输掉零场或一场比赛的玩家

testcases.input: matches = [[1,3],[2,3],[3,6],[5,6],[5,7],[4,5],[4,8],[4,9],[10,4],[10,9]] Output: [[1,2,10],[4,5,7,8]] Explanation: Players 1, 2, and 10 have not lost any matches. Players 4, 5, 7, and 8 each have lost one match. Players 3, 6, and 9 each have lost two matches. Thus, answer[0] = [1,2,10] and answer[1] = [4,5,7,8].
testcases.expectedOutput: [[1,2,10],[4,5,7,8]] Explanation: Players 1, 2, and 10 have not lost any matches. Players 4, 5, 7, and 8 each have lost one match. Players 3, 6, and 9 each have lost two matches. Thus, answer[0] = [1,2,10] and answer[1] = [4,5,7,8].

testcases.input: matches = [[2,3],[1,3],[5,4],[6,4]] Output: [[1,2,5,6],[]] Explanation: Players 1, 2, 5, and 6 have not lost any matches. Players 3 and 4 each have lost two matches. Thus, answer[0] = [1,2,5,6] and answer[1] = [].
testcases.expectedOutput: [[1,2,5,6],[]] Explanation: Players 1, 2, 5, and 6 have not lost any matches. Players 3 and 4 each have lost two matches. Thus, answer[0] = [1,2,5,6] and answer[1] = [].
